strapi-ai-translator.button.tooltip.disa: Translation is only available for localized content types
strapi-ai-translator.button.tooltip.erro: Translation failed. Click to try again
strapi-ai-translator.plugin.name: Strapi AI Translator
strapi-ai-translator.plugin.page.descrip: Configure the Strapi AI Translator plugin settings. Be aware that Base Model, API Key and LLM Base URL need to be set as environment variables.
strapi-ai-translator.plugin.page.form.ll: Base URL for the LLM API. It needs to be set as an environment variable.
Model that will be used to generate the translations. It needs to be set as an environment variable.
A higher value will make the output more random, while a lower value will make it more focused and deterministic.
strapi-ai-translator.plugin.page.form.sy: This is (part) of the prompt that will be used to instruct the LLM. It should be clear and concise.
strapi-ai-translator.plugin.page.title: Strapi AI Translator (Configuration)
strapi-ai-translator.settings.fields.des: Choose which fields the AI Translator should translate. Fields turned off are excluded from translation and left untouched in the response.
strapi-ai-translator.settings.fields.emp: No localized content types found. Enable Internationalization on a content type with at least one translatable field to configure it here.
strapi-ai-translator.plugin.page.field_s: Turn individual fields on or off per content type on the Translatable Fields settings page.
